default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss hiring and onboarding details for a new full-time employee candidate.](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The candidate, Sarah, is being offered a full-time employee role as an SEO Content Manager at a salary of $36,000 per year.](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Need to clarify expectations with Sarah around being fully dedicated without outside work/clients.](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Will provide company laptop and equipment, no additional benefits.](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Contract terms include 1 month notice period, non-compete, and non-solicitation clauses.](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Background

  - [Currently a Content Manager at SnapStack and freelance writer on Upwork](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Strong English skills](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Asking for top of market salary based on research](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)

### Employment Terms

  - [Full-time employee, 40 hours per week](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [1 month notice period](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Role: SEO Content Manager](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Salary: $36,000 per year](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [No overtime pay, bonuses or commissions](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Company provides laptop and equipment](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [No health insurance/benefits included](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)

### Contract Details

  - [1 month notice period](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [12 month non-compete clause](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [24 month non-solicitation clause](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [No paid/voluntary outside work allowed](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [Jimmy (GrowthX) to be Sarah's supervisor](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Molly to have final conversation with Sarah to:](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
      - [Present offer details and confirm acceptance](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
      - [Clarify expectations around being fully dedicated, no outside work](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
      - [Determine timeline for winding down other commitments](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
      - [Discuss employment type preference (employee vs contractor initially)](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Document contract terms and rationale in a shared notion doc](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [Finalize offer letter and employment contract](https://fathom.video/share/6HCDa5_gxzsdxGVpWvgSt59wakPbKAc_?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)

action_items.description: Reach out to Sarah to clarify expectations around being a full-time employee vs. contractor, discussing winding down other work, and having a final conversation to clarify expectations around being fully dedicated and not doing side work
Take screenshots of contract settings and document in Notion
